title: Robin Appears on the Merry
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on the sky island rumor begins. The crew hears clues that point beyond normal seas, setting up the mystery of an island in the sky and the search for proof.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Sky Island Rumor Begins sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Vivi, Luffy, Nami, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You don't know who their leader is?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Igaram... Can you tell what I'm thinking...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes, that's all the more reason then!

summary: The crew hears clues that point beyond normal seas, setting up the mystery of an island in the sky and the search for proof.
